channel.title: nlin.SI updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: nlin.SI updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Multicomponent pentagon maps
item.description: arXiv:2604.07231v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We provide necessary and sufficient conditions for maps that satisfy associative-like conditions on families of n-ary magmas to be pentagon maps. We obtain parametric-pentagon maps and we propose a procedure that generates families of multicomponent pentagon and entwining pentagon maps from a given pentagon map.
item.dc:creator: Pavlos Kassotakis

item.title: Analytic General Solution of the Riccati equation
item.description: arXiv:2510.19297v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: A novel integrability condition for the Riccati equation, the simplest form of nonlinear ordinary differential equations, is obtained by using elementary quadrature method. Under this condition, the analytic general solution is presented, which can be extended to second-order linear ordinary differential equation. This result may provide valuable mathematical criteria for in-depth research on quantum mechanics, relativity and dynamical systems.
item.dc:creator: Zhao Ji-Xiang

item.title: Long time asymptotics for the KPII equation
item.description: arXiv:2509.02907v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The long-time asymptotics of small Kadomtsev-Petviashvili II (KPII) solutions is derived using the inverse scattering theory and the stationary phase method.
item.dc:creator: Derchyi Wu
